sn20.4:1.0.1: At Sāvatthī. "Bhikkhus, if someone were to give away a hundred pots of foodas charity in the morning, a hundred pots of food as charity at noon, and a hundred pots of food as charity in the evening, and if someone else were to develop a mind of lovingkindness even for the time it takes to pull a cow's udder, either in the morning, at noon, or in the evening, this would be more fruitful than the former.
